# 获取指定类别公众号内的日榜周榜月榜

## OpenAPI Specification

```yaml
openapi: 3.0.1
info:
  title: ''
  description: ''
  version: 1.0.0
paths:
  /fbmain/rank/v1/get_account_type_rank:
    post:
      summary: 获取指定类别公众号内的日榜周榜月榜
      deprecated: false
      description: >-
        行业id对照表


        <table><thead><tr><th>ID</th><th>行业类别</th> <th>ID</th>
        <th>行业类别</th></tr></thead> <tbody><tr><td>1</td> <td>国际</td> <td>14</td>
        <td>旅游</td></tr> <tr><td>2</td> <td>体育</td> <td>15</td> <td>美食</td></tr>
        <tr><td>3</td> <td>娱乐</td> <td>16</td> <td>文化</td></tr> <tr><td>4</td>
        <td>社会</td> <td>17</td> <td>健康养生</td></tr> <tr><td>5</td> <td>财经</td>
        <td>18</td> <td>搞笑</td></tr> <tr><td>6</td> <td>事实</td> <td>19</td>
        <td>家居</td></tr> <tr><td>7</td> <td>科技</td> <td>20</td> <td>动漫</td></tr>
        <tr><td>8</td> <td>情感</td> <td>21</td> <td>宠物</td></tr> <tr><td>9</td>
        <td>汽车</td> <td>22</td> <td>母婴育儿</td></tr> <tr><td>10</td> <td>教育</td>
        <td>23</td> <td>星座运势</td></tr> <tr><td>11</td> <td>时尚</td> <td>24</td>
        <td>历史</td></tr> <tr><td>12</td> <td>游戏</td> <td>25</td>
        <td>音乐</td></tr> <tr><td>13</td> <td>军事</td> <td>26</td>
        <td>综合</td></tr></tbody></table>



        状态码

        <table><thead><tr><th>状态码</th> <th>说明</th></tr></thead>
        <tbody><tr><td>{"message":"Internal Server Error"}</td>
        <td>网络错误，请重试1~3次</td></tr> <tr><td>0</td> <td>成功</td></tr>
        <tr><td>-1</td> <td>QPS超过上限，不得高于5次/秒，请5秒后再试！</td></tr> <tr><td>100</td>
        <td>缺少参数 biz,name,url 三者必须至少有一个</td></tr> <tr><td>101,102,103</td>
        <td>biz不合法，请检查。（Tips：biz必须是8-10位数字进行base64编码</td></tr> <tr><td>104</td>
        <td>短连接文章已被删除或文章被迁移</td></tr> <tr><td>105</td>
        <td>没找到该名称的公众号，建议您采用biz或者url作为参数获取！</td></tr> <tr><td>110</td>
        <td>翻页内没有文章了！</td></tr> <tr><td>111</td> <td>请求频繁，请稍后再试。</td></tr>
        <tr><td>112</td> <td>请求失败，请稍后再试。</td></tr> <tr><td>113</td>
        <td>鉴权失败，请稍后再试。</td></tr> <tr><td>115</td>
        <td>该页以及后面的翻页内文章已全部被删除！</td></tr> <tr><td>2003</td>
        <td>系统资源请求出错，请重新尝试。</td></tr> <tr><td>2005</td>
        <td>系统错误，请2秒后重新尝试。</td></tr> <tr><td>10002</td> <td>key或附加码不正确</td></tr>
        <tr><td>20001</td> <td>金额不足，请充值</td></tr> <tr><td>20002</td>
        <td>请输入正确的微信链接</td></tr> <tr><td>20003</td>
        <td>文章链接有误，请检查文章链接url中的&amp;是否已经编码为%26</td></tr> <tr><td>50000</td>
        <td>内部服务器错误</td></tr></tbody></table>


        ### 返回结果

        | 字段 | 说明 |

        | --- | --- |

        | ['data']['data'][i]['rank'] | 排名 |

        | ['data']['data'][i]['mp_name'] | 公众号名称 |

        | ['data']['data'][i]['wxid'] | 微信ID |

        | ['data']['data'][i]['avg_top_readnum'] | 头条平均阅读 |

        | ['data']['data'][i]['avg_readnum'] | 平均阅读 |

        | ['data']['data'][i]['post_total'] | 日发文数 |

        | ['data']['data'][i]['zan_total'] | 总点赞数 |

        | ['data']['data'][i]['original_index'] | 原创指数 |

        | ['data']['data'][i]['dajiala_index'] | 极致了指数 |

        | ['data']['data'][i]['avatar'] | 头像链接 |

        | ['data']['total'] | 总数 |
      tags:
        - 公众号账号搜索和账号基本信息
      parameters: []
      requestBody:
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                date_type:
                  type: string
                  description: 0(日榜), 1(周榜), 2(月榜)（0.02元/次）
                page:
                  type: string
                  description: 页(一页20条数据)
                industry_id:
                  type: string
                  description: 行业分类id（1-26）
                key:
                  type: string
                  description: 极致了官网 key
                verifycode:
                  type: string
                  description: 附加码 (如设置了附加码verifycode，则此参数为必选，如未设置则为非必选)
              required:
                - date_type
                - page
                - industry_id
                - key
                - verifycode
              x-apifox-orders:
                - date_type
                - page
                - industry_id
                - key
                - verifycode
            example:
              date_type: '0'
              page: '1'
              industry_id: '26'
              key: '{{key}}'
              verifycode: ''
      responses:
        '200':
          description: ''
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  msg:
                    type: string
                  error_code:
                    type: integer
                  data:
                    type: object
                    properties:
                      data:
                        type: array
                        items:
                          type: object
                          properties:
                            rank:
                              type: integer
                              description: 排名
                            id:
                              type: integer
                            mp_name:
                              type: string
                              description: 公众号名称
                            wxid:
                              type: string
                              description: 微信ID
                            rank_aid:
                              type: integer
                            avg_top_readnum:
                              type: string
                              description: 头条平均阅读
                            avg_readnum:
                              type: string
                              description: 平均阅读
                            total_read:
                              type: string
                            post_total:
                              type: integer
                              description: 日发文数
                            zan_total:
                              type: integer
                              description: 总点赞数
                            real_index:
                              type: number
                            original_index:
                              type: number
                              description: 原创指数
                            dajiala_index:
                              type: number
                              description: 极致了指数
                            avatar:
                              type: string
                              description: 头像链接
                            is_favorite:
                              type: integer
                          required:
                            - rank
                            - id
                            - mp_name
                            - wxid
                            - rank_aid
                            - avg_top_readnum
                            - avg_readnum
                            - total_read
                            - post_total
                            - zan_total
                            - real_index
                            - original_index
                            - dajiala_index
                            - avatar
                            - is_favorite
                          x-apifox-orders:
                            - rank
                            - id
                            - mp_name
                            - wxid
                            - rank_aid
                            - avg_top_readnum
                            - avg_readnum
                            - total_read
                            - post_total
                            - zan_total
                            - real_index
                            - original_index
                            - dajiala_index
                            - avatar
                            - is_favorite
                      total:
                        type: integer
                        description: 总数
                    required:
                      - data
                      - total
                    x-apifox-orders:
                      - data
                      - total
                required:
                  - msg
                  - error_code
                  - data
                x-apifox-orders:
                  - msg
                  - error_code
                  - data
              example:
                msg: success
                error_code: 0
                data:
                  data:
                    - rank: 1
                      id: 339734
                      mp_name: 运动与解剖

                      avg_top_readnum: 10w+
```
